summary: Deep scans now show an orange in-progress theme, a clear indicator, and an explanation under the scanner log.
introduced: Deep Scan in progress banner with pulsing scope icon while a thorough scan runs
About deep scan section under Scanner log — explains file-by-file indexing, better unmapped-space coverage, and expected duration
changed: Deep scan uses an orange theme (progress ring, bar, steps, stat tiles, and panel border) so it is visually distinct from Fast scan
Menu bar popover shows a Deep Scan label and orange progress styling during thorough indexing
